---
title: "The relationship between facial attractiveness and perceived guilt across crime type"
authors: "Kramer, R. S. S., Jarvis, J.-L., Green, M., & Jones, A. L."
year: 2023
date: 2023-01-01
pub-journal: "Quarterly Journal of Experimental Psychology"
volume: "1–9"
doi: "10.1177/17470218231218651"
pdf: "assets/papers/2023/kramerjarvisgreenjones2023.pdf"
categories: [first-impressions, attractiveness]
---
